properties.query: SELECT c.category_id, c.category_name, c.village_id, c.creator_id, u.nickname AS creator_nickname, c.created_at FROM category c JOIN Users u ON c.creator_id = u.user_id WHERE c.village_id = ? ORDER BY c.category_id ASC
INSERT INTO category(category_name, village_id, creator_id) VALUES (?, ?, ?)
UPDATE category SET category_name = ? WHERE category_id = ? AND creator_id = ?
DELETE FROM category WHERE category_id = ? AND creator_id = ?
